title: New Products Added to the U.S. Additional Tariff List on Steel and Aluminum
bodyHtml:
New products have been added to the list of derivative steel and aluminum items subject to a 50% additional tariff by the United States under Section 232.

The relevant updates have been announced through guidelines published by the U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP).

For derivative products classified outside Chapters 73 and 76, the additional tariff is applied only on the steel and aluminum content.

Click below for the complete lists, with newly added products indicated in bold:

  • Announcement on steel products
  • List of steel products subject to measures
  • Announcement on aluminum products
  • List of aluminum products subject to measures
